user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Escalation / Customer Retention

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I completely understand why you are so frustrated. It sounds like we have really let you down here, and I am truly sorry for the trouble and inconvenience this has caused you. Your experience is important to us, and it's clear we missed the mark this time.

I want to get this fixed for you immediately. Could you please share a few more details about the exact issue you're running into? I will personally look into your account right now and make sure we find a solution as quickly as possible. 

Thank you for your patience while we work together to get this sorted out. I'm standing by for your reply.

Best regards,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a support response drafting request and provided a professional, empathetic draft as instructed by its system prompt.
